modules.name: VF Kabel Forum Thresholds
modules.description: Signal thresholds derived from the vodafonekabelforum.de community guidelines. More lenient than the official Vodafone spec profile shipped with DOCSight.
modules.author: itsDNNS

modules.name: UDM WAN Monitor
modules.description: Monitor WAN1 and WAN2 on Ubiquiti UDM Pro/SE devices. Tracks link state, alive status, and failover events in the global DOCSight event log.
modules.author: Oggy512

modules.name: FRITZ!Box WAN Bandwidth
modules.description: Poll current WAN upload/download throughput from an AVM FRITZ!Box via TR-064 and keep a local history for correlating own traffic with DOCSight signal data.
modules.author: itsDNNS
